$comment: Design tokens reference, extracted from design/oura_design_specifications_final.md (Stitch's own generated brand spec) and cross-checked against apps/web/app/globals.css, where these values are already implemented as the app's live CSS theme. This file documents the existing single source of truth — it is not consumed by the app and does not change any code.

fontDisplay.note: Latin-only glyphs. Never applied to Hebrew text (CLAUDE.md guardrail) — used only for pure-Latin branding bits like "OURA"/"PLATINUM" badges.

fontSans.note: Default for all body/UI text, including Hebrew.

headlineMedium.tailwind: arbitrary (no exact Tailwind default; text-[32px] or nearest text-3xl/text-4xl used ad hoc)
